input.prompt: refactor the auth hook and migrate all files

isa.principles:
- Paths must be generalized through $HOME and environment variables.
- Prefer pure functions; isolate I/O to a single resolver.
isa.constraints:
- Installer must create backups before modifying local config.
- Non-macOS devices must be able to skip voice.
isa.outOfScope: Bundling private memory, credentials, backups, or proprietary voice packs is out of scope.
isa.antiCriteria:
Anti: never scan ~/.agents/skill-clusters/skills wholesale at startup.
Anti: never write file bodies into the context block; pointers only.
